title: The Five Nights at Freddy's | FNAF Mod
description: Bring monsters from the FNAF Franchise straight into your minecraft world!
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Five_Nights_at_Freddys_Mod/BH_TFNAFM_banner1.webp) This Mod Brings the terrors of Five Nights at Freddy's in your Minecraft world! This Mod Has Characters from The Franchise Custom Structures Based on All FNaF Media and Working Cameras! and even more features Coming Soon! [Our official Website!](https://thefnafmod.com) [Official Partners With Bisect Hosting! use Code: DevMultiverse for 25% on your first Purchase](https://bisecthosting.com/DevMultiverse) [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Five_Nights_at_Freddys_Mod/BH_TFNAFM_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/DevMultiverse) ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Five_Nights_at_Freddys_Mod/BH_TFNAFM_banner2.webp) [

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_8c61b755-377c-4369-9110-a816f4d50f16.png)](https://discord.gg/ke2bF9f8TE)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_1edb5a8c-e8ae-4dbb-a2e8-90f884f4f296.png)](https://www.patreon.com/MephilisDevMultiverse)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_5b07a4bb-dd4e-44bd-a8fb-427c6b21efc3.png)](https://twitter.com/ModFnaf)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_f219d32b-abf5-46a1-bf45-3ab39d05e32f.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@FNAFMod) [

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_a754fc17-49fd-416f-bedd-241892ea2857.png)](https://open.spotify.com/artist/2XhO0KLRVV6lMbxBTFb4Jq)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_4809955d-df62-49c1-b2f6-c8152aa73adb.png)](https://soundcloud.com/fnaf-mod) [**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/513493/description_21a7e45a-1fd4-4dc1-9bbc-62e2c650fb89.png)**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib) ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/The_Five_Nights_at_Freddys_Mod/BH_TFNAFM_banner3.webp) ![](https://i.imgur.com/h4nt4NH.png) This mod is based on the Five Nights at Freddy's franchise by Scott Cawthon all the characters are owned by Scott Cawthon unless stated otherwise **_You're not allowed to repost this mod on any other site than the ones I personally link to_**. I can't guarantee downloads of my mod on other sites are safe! (Do note that posting a link to this page is allowed)
